calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Discharged

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Continued For Letter To Apr-22-14 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: 2:43 pm

Appearances:
David Marcolini, Esq, specially appearing for Judgment Creditor, Berry Company.
No Appearance by Judgment Debtor, Liyan He.

The Court orders counsel for Judgment Creditor to check Room 633 for Judgment Debtor.

3:00 pm
Counsel comes back and reports that Judgment Debtor is not in Room 633.
The Court orders a Bench letter to be issued to the Judgment Debtor, for failure to appear at OEX inspite of proof of service.
Counsel confirms address of Judgment Debtor Liyan He at 2262 40th Ave, San Francisco, CA 94116.
The case is continued to April 22, 2014 at 2:00 pm.
Matter is adjourned.

Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman and J. Murphy, Not Reported (D514)
